facebook.caption:
3,156 reviews. 4.7 stars. And somehow Nhà hàng Vịnh Xanh Phú Quốc still surprises first-timers.

Sit on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, order the seafood, watch Phu Quoc slow down around you. This is the kind of meal that makes you extend your trip.

If you're eating out in Phu Quoc, this one earns its reputation. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
